rationale: The proposed change concerns the Tax Code §11.13(b) residence homestead exemption. Educ. Code §48.302 governs a high school equivalency exam subsidy program and has no connection to homestead exemptions or property tax appraisals.
quote: The agency shall enter into a memorandum of understanding with the commission for the agency to transfer funds to the commission for the commission to provide to an individual who is 21 years of age or older a subsidy in an amount equal to the cost of taking one high school equivalency examination administered under Section 7.111.
_note: No relationship between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this education subsidy provision.
